creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
At Tue, 24 Oct 2000 22:10:03 -0700 (PDT),
Trevor Johnson wrote:
>  > And add BUILD_DEPENDS on devel/patch. w3m-0.1.11-pre-kokb17.patch
>  > requires this.
>  
>  What does /usr/bin/patch do wrong on your system?  On mine I get a
>  checksum mismatch for the patch, but when I do "make NO_CHECKSUM=yes" it
>  applies cleanly.  Please have another look at the patch file, to see
>  whether anything important has changed since the version you used.

It actually was changed.  The previous one included the following line
that our patch (version 2.1) couldn't handle:

\ No newline at end of file

But the patch author seems to have fixed it later.

>  > +BUILD_DEPENDS=	patch:${PORTSDIR}/devel/patch
>  > +PATCH=		${LOCALBASE}/bin/patch
>  >  BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/lib/libgc.a:${PORTSDIR}/devel/boehm-gc
>  
>  The way you wrote this, the first BUILD_DEPENDS line has no effect,
>  because the second one supersedes it.  As far as I can see, the first on
>  is unnecessary anyway.

Exactly.

>  I made some trivial changes that were suggested by portlint.  I've
>  appended what I have.

Thansk, noted.  I've already done similar changes.  Will commit soon.
